ConnectionStrings._note: Provide DefaultConnection via user secrets in development (dotnet user-secrets), or environment/Key Vault in production. Never commit the real connection string.

Loremaster._aiModelNote: AiModel is the Azure OpenAI deployment name, not the model name. Deployment 'nornis-ask' -> model gpt-5.4 (snapshot 2026-03-05; upgraded from gpt-5.4-mini 2026-07-16 for answer quality — also powers Continuity Audit and Retrospective via the shared client). The ModelPricing key MUST match AiModel or cost tracking silently records $0. Rates per 1M tokens (verify against your resource's pricing blade): input $2.50 / output $15.00.
